settings.title: Settings
settings.temperatureHint: Lower is more precise, higher is more creative (initial value for AI generation)
settings.simpleModeDescription: Keep AI responses concise — describe only what features were added or what was fixed, in plain language

ai.welcomeDescription: Set up the AI model you want to use. You can choose to save your API key in the OS keychain or a file.
ai.keychainDescription: The API key is stored in the OS keychain and cannot be read by other applications.
ai.fileDescription: The API key is stored in credentials.json in the config directory (permissions 600).
ai.temperatureNotSupported: * This model does not support the Temperature parameter

error.modelRequired: Please select or enter a model

env.title: Environment Check
env.description: Check if Node.js and npm are available
env.wingetNotFound: Windows Package Manager (winget) was not found.
env.updateAppInstaller: Update App Installer from Microsoft Store
env.manualInstallFallback: If the Store doesn't open, please install each tool manually from the links below.
env.waitForSetup: Please wait for the setup to complete
env.installRequiredTools: Please install the required tools and try again
env.nodejsRequired: Node.js is required for the app's development server and dependency management.
env.setupConfirmDesc: The following tools will be installed using winget
env.vsBuildToolsWarning: VS Build Tools installation requires approximately 4.5 GB of free space and a stable internet connection. A Wi-Fi connection is recommended.
env.uacDescription: If a Windows confirmation dialog (UAC) appears during installation, click "Yes" to allow it. This is standard Windows behavior to confirm system changes.

chat.title: Chat
chat.aiNotConfigured: AI not set — configure from the toolbar
chat.emptyStatePrompt: Tell me what you want to build, like "Make it a task management app" or "Add dark mode".
chat.emptyStateNoProject: Create a project from "New App" in the toolbar, then start building via chat.

suggestion.todoApp: Make it a ToDo list app

chat.inputPlaceholder: Tell me what app you want to build...
chat.streamEndedWithoutResult: ⚠️ The stream ended but the tool result was not obtained

error.aiNotConfiguredDetailed: ⚠️ AI is not configured. Please configure it from the "{{notConfiguredLabel}}" button in the toolbar.
error.noProjectSelected: ⚠️ No project is selected. Create a project from "{{newAppLabel}}" in the toolbar or select one from app history.
error.apiKeyRequiredDetailed:
⚠️ {{provider}} requires an API key.
Configure it from "{{modelLabel}}" → "API Key Settings" in the toolbar.
error.invalidApiKey: The API key is invalid or not configured. Check it from "API Key Settings" in the toolbar.
error.sidecarConnectionFailed:
Cannot connect to the sidecar server.
Run `npm run sidecar` and try again.
error.sidecarConnectionHint:
Please check that the sidecar server is running.
Run `npm run sidecar` and try again.

project.label: Project
project.switchingDesc: You can start chatting once the new project is ready.
project.preparingWithName:
Expanding the "{{appName}}" template and
starting the dev server
project.preparingGeneric: Expanding template and starting the dev server
project.autoDismiss: This screen will automatically close when ready
project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
project.createNewDesc: Create a new app from scratch with DeskSpawn.
project.templateReact: Uses React + Vite + Tailwind CSS template
project.templateIndexedDB: Data is automatically saved to IndexedDB (browser built-in DB)
project.templateShare: Export/Import to share apps with others
project.sidecarError:
Cannot connect to the sidecar server.
Run `npm run sidecar` and try again.

fileTree.selectFileToPreview: Select a file to see its contents
